decision_log.audio_reactivity_source: beat-simulation (user-aligned 2026-07-02): no real audio tap; pseudo-beat synthesized from playback state + per-track seed. Zero permissions, works for every source, identical across Spotify/YouTube/local.

features.title: GroovePulse engine — deterministic pseudo-beat as a pure function of (trackSeed, date)
features.acceptance: Pure nonisolated function; no timers, no Combine, no $position reads; per-track BPM in 72-132 range derived from a stable track hash; amplitude is smooth (no frame pops) and exactly 0 when not playing.

features.title: Vinyl groove shimmer — record grooves breathe with the pseudo-beat
features.acceptance: VinylDiskView grooves modulate opacity/width inside the EXISTING 30fps TimelineView; paused ⇒ static; no extra render clock; CPU delta ≈ 0 vs baseline.

features.title: Liquid disc beat swell — blob radii swell on the same pulse
features.acceptance: LiquidDiscView blob radius modulated by the same GroovePulse value so vinyl and liquidDisc agree on the beat; idle ⇒ perfectly still.

features.title: Ambient color temperature — glass warms at night, cools by day
features.acceptance: Palette post-process shifts white-point by local hour (piecewise curve, no location permission); ≤ 6% channel shift so album identity stays dominant; recomputed lazily (on palette change / hour tick), never per frame.

features.title: Critic + QA gate for CRE-001..003
features.acceptance: swift build 0 warnings; adversarial review confirms per-tick invariant, isolation rules, pause behavior; e2e size-switch spec unaffected.

critic_round_1.verdict: 0 BLOCK, 4 FLAG, 5 NIT — all FLAGs fixed in round 2
fixes: FLAG1: groove Canvas is frame-constant again (rasterized once at 1.6x brightness; beat applied as layer opacity 0.625-1.0 — compositor transform, no re-raster)
FLAG2: container no longer observes NowPlayingService; isPlaying/trackTitle/trackArtist passed as plain values from parent widgets (no per-position-tick body re-eval)
FLAG3: NSImage never crosses the actor boundary; caller snapshots tiffRepresentation Data on @MainActor, task-local NSImage decoded on the concurrent executor
FLAG4: task(id:) key is content-based (title+artist+pixel dims) — survives pointer reuse, re-extracts on hi-res artwork upgrade
NIT5+NIT9 also fixed (doc drift; tokens hoisted out of the frame closure)
critic_round_1.accepted_nits: NIT6 (beat grid is wall-clock anchored — inherent to simulation), NIT7 (pre-2001 clock, unreachable), NIT8 (30fps sampling aliasing on beat edge — cosmetic)
